name: Meatballs Kirkland
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost the meatballs in the microwave oven.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet.
3. Fry the meatballs and mushrooms until the meatballs are heated through and the mushrooms are golden brown.
4. Mix together the soups, milk, and water.
5. Pour the mixture over the meatballs.
6. Cook until hot and thickened.
7. Serve over hot buttered noodles.
